title: Player Sensor
description: Add a sensor that detects a player when nearby and release redstone pulse or persistent signal.
body:
# DESCRIPTION **Adds 2 types of player sensor, a pulse and persistent one.** - Pulse Sensor - detects when a player is nearby and send a pulse redstone signal and turn off a few seconds, just like a button but does not need to manually press. - Persistent Sensor - detects when a player is nearby and send a persistent redstone signal and turn off only when the player leaves, just like a lever but does not need to manually activate. # RECIPES
Spoiler **Replace the center with either a lever or a stone button, for pulse or persistent sensor.** ![Recipe for the 2 types of sensor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4172ed8da4fadf0be40a5fdf93a58da5e085244c.png)
#
Your support is very much appreciated 😊 [![Donate via Ko-fi](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/9fzfevkxtje7qus10kfb2/400-63-kofi_button_red-2.png?rlkey=neocwsdasxcn8syd6xvybldgp&st=6uwwgv4n&raw=1)](https://ko-fi.com/sorasetsuna) #
Can I use this in my modpack? - Yes, you may.
